basic_details.job_title: Gauhati High Court Law Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Gauhati High Court Law Clerk Notification 2026 has been released on 6 May 2026 on the official website of Gauhati High Court. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Gauhati High Court Law Clerk Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: OBC/MOBC: 43 years SC/ST(P)/ST(H): 45 years PwBD: Relaxation as per rules

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Law, Post Graduate in Law, Doctorate in Law
qualification.details: Graduate / Post Graduate in Law or Doctorate in Law from any recognized University in India (as on 20-05-2026). Preference to candidates practicing at the Bar or having professional experience or literary works in Law.

selection_process: Written Examination (Objective type MCQ) Interview / Viva-Voce Final Merit List
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gauhati High Court to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Gauhati High Court Law Clerk recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Gauhati High Court Law Clerk recruitment is 20th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Law Clerk post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Law Clerk position in the Gauhati High Court.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Law Clerk post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate, Post Graduate, or Doctorate in Law from a recognized university. Preference will be given to those with legal practice experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Law Clerk position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Law Clerk post is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Law Clerk post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Law Clerk position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Gauhati High Court Law Clerk recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 250/- for SC/ST candidates. PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Law Clerk recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Examination (Objective type MCQ), followed by an Interview / Viva-Voce, and the final merit list preparation.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The Gauhati High Court Law Clerk position is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Law Clerk position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official Gauhati High Court website or via the direct 'Apply Online' link provided in the 'Important Links' section before the deadline of 20th May 2026.
